info.name: RAS API Collection
info.description:
## A few things to remember
### Headers

**Accept: application/json:**
to ensure you get JSON response in case of any unforseen error not handled in the backend, pass the header Accept: application/json to your API calls

### Authorization: 

**Bearer token:**
For endpoints requiring authentication, please pass the auth token thus: Authorization: Beaer sometokenhere
